title: Hnsi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Hnsi''' were a [[Human/Legends|Human]] tribe native to [[Thracior]]. They objected to their people [[Marriage/Legends|marrying]] members of other tribes such as the [[Tantt]]. If done, it usually ended in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the whole family.

[[Floria]] and [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]] were members of the Hnsi.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' {{Ab|Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
